name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for visiting Bright Smile — how did we do?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks so much for coming in to see us at Bright Smile Dental. We hope the visit felt easier than you expected — that's the whole reason we do this.

If you have 30 seconds, we'd really appreciate a quick review. Honest feedback helps other folks who are nervous about the dentist find a place where they'll be looked after:

https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

And if something didn't sit right, please just hit reply — we'd much rather hear it from you directly so we can make it right.

Thanks again,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick follow-up. If you have 30 seconds, a short review really helps us out: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. Thanks!

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
